name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Use Claude Code from Codex CLI: ask, review, or delegate tasks to local Claude, with session continuity and background jobs.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate tasks from Codex to local Claude Code and get structured results back
interface.longDescription: Bridge between Codex and a local Claude Code CLI. The Codex model can delegate tasks to Claude via MCP tools and receive structured results back. Designed for: asking Claude about code, getting second-opinion reviews with JSON-schema output, and delegating focused edit tasks. Uses Claude's native --session-id/--resume for session continuity. Runs Claude as a controlled subruntime (--bare --permission-mode=plan --strict-mcp-config). NOT a security sandbox. POSIX-only (macOS/Linux). Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or apiKeyHelper.
interface.defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review this change, or delegate a focused edit task.
